ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "theta" REAL /* Angle parameter from the sensor */,
  "theta_d" REAL /* Angular velocity parameter from the sensor */,
  "x" REAL /* Position parameter from the sensor */,
  "x_d" REAL /* Linear velocity parameter from the sensor */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor information */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Rate at which data is being sampled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_forces" (
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each force entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding sensor data entry */,
  "force_in" REAL /* Force applied to the system at the time of data capture */,
  "theta_dd" REAL /* Angular acceleration parameter at the time */,
  "x_dd" REAL /* Linear acceleration parameter at the time */,
  "force_type" TEXT /* Type of force applied (e.g., external, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_forces_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control parameter entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding sensor data entry */,
  "control_setting" REAL /* Control setting value applied to the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control setting was applied */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm used */,
  "tuning_parameter" REAL /* Tuning parameter value used in the control algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_parameters_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the physical system */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding sensor data entry */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., FFT, filtering) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding physical system */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
